linux.changelog:
This update introduces remote control functionality and data logging capabilities.
## 🎮 Remote Control

* Multi-Joystick Support: Added support for multiple controllers with a new UI for dynamic assignment of MAVLink messages.
* Custom Mapping: Create custom joystick binds, calibrate inputs, and map them to specific control roles.
* Dynamic Role Assignment: Supports dynamic routing of mapped roles into standard MAVLink messages (MANUAL_CONTROL, RC_CHANNELS and RC_CHANNELS_OVERRIDE). 

## 📊 Data Logging

* Per-Port Logging: Implemented MAVLink message logging for each configured COM port using the standard PX4 ULog library.
* Simplified Control: A single global flag (enabled by default) toggles data logging across all ports.
* Data Integrity: Input and output messages are logged into separate, port-specific files to prevent data overlap.
* Standard Compatibility: Generated logs are fully compatible with standard ULog parsers and have been verified in MATLAB.
